title: Wire F5 build/run flow to execute the mounted OxVba project through the shell runtime
close_reason: F5 now executes the mounted OxVba project into the build/run surface and the shell runtime shows real run output instead of a scene-only stub

title: Replace workspace-derived semantic shell content with direct OxVba semantic adapter
close_reason: Mounted workspaces now carry a direct OxVba semantic snapshot and the shell prefers those diagnostics, symbols, hover, and references over local heuristics

title: W020 runtime shell foundation epic
close_reason: Completed the runtime shell foundation with layout, focus, editor surface, and content providers behind the proven TUI shell

title: Roll out W020 runtime shell foundation into execution beads
description: Expand the runtime shell foundation workset into executable beads once the shell mockup is proven.
close_reason: Completed: W020 rollout has been expanded into executable runtime-shell beads.

title: Introduce runtime shell state and layout-policy types behind the mockup shell
description: Replace the purely mockup-shaped shell state with explicit runtime shell state and layout-policy types that can survive beyond the design demo.
close_reason: Completed: scene/demo concerns are now separated from runtime shell state, and layout policy is explicit in the shell state model rather than implied by ad hoc helpers.

title: Introduce buffer, view, and layout model types into the new shell foundation
description: Add the first real buffer/view/layout ownership model described by ARCHITECTURE.md without yet wiring OxVba services.
close_reason: Introduced explicit runtime-owned buffer, view, and layout model types into the shell foundation

title: Attach editor-surface and region-focus routing to the runtime shell model
description: Move focus ownership and shell-region routing out of the mockup-only logic and into the runtime shell model with an explicit editor-surface seam.
close_reason: Attached editor-surface state and explicit region-focus routing to the runtime shell model

title: Replace fake shell content with runtime-owned state providers while preserving the proven TUI shape
description: Swap the shell mock-data surfaces for runtime-owned providers and verify the shell still honors DESIGN_TUI after the refactor.
close_reason: Replaced remaining scene-hardcoded shell text with runtime-owned buffer and panel content providers

title: W030 service integration epic
close_reason: W030 is now implemented: the shell mounts real project/document sessions, renders OxVba-backed semantic surfaces, and executes the mounted project through the intended OxVba runtime seam

title: Roll out W030 service integration into execution beads
description: Expand the project/document/semantic/build-run integration workset into executable beads once the runtime shell foundation is ready.
close_reason: Rolled W030 service integration into concrete execution beads

title: Attach project and document sessions to the runtime shell foundation
close_reason: Added file-backed project and document session seams and mounted a real .basproj workspace into the runtime shell

title: Feed real semantic diagnostics, symbols, and references into inspector and lower surfaces
close_reason: Inspector and lower-surface semantic content now derives from the mounted workspace, including symbol discovery, hover context, diagnostics, and reference lists

title: Wire real build, run, and output flows into the shell runtime
close_reason: Build/run inspector and output surfaces now consume a typed runtime execution snapshot populated from the loaded project session instead of static mock build text

title: Replace mock launch and workspace-open flows with real first-run and project-opening state
close_reason: Startup now opens into a real first-run shell, discovers .basproj files, supports launcher selection, and mounts a selected or CLI-provided project into the runtime workspace

title: Replace typed execution snapshot with direct OxVba execution contract
description: Replace the current project-session-derived build/run snapshot with a direct OxVba execution seam once the host-side contract is ready for the TUI shell.
close_reason: Replaced the synthetic project-session execution snapshot with an OxVba-backed execution adapter and verified the sample runtime contract in tests

title: W038 UX Development Lab epic
description: Build the terminal UX development lab in phases: minimum W039 substrate first, then shell scenario loops, VT review tools, and interactive lab after W039.

title: W038-B00 Lab phasing and W039 substrate contract
description: Refactor W038 into phases and update W039 so Fire Horse proof work depends only on the minimum UX-lab substrate.
close_reason: Completed phased W038 plan, W039 infrastructure references, and interleaved live bead graph.

title: W038-B09 Interactive oxide-uxlab scenario browser
description: Extend oxide-uxlab into a three-pane interactive browser for registered scenarios and viewports.

title: W038-B10 Interactive golden and diff pane
description: Add capture, golden, diff, and guarded bless flows to the interactive lab.

title: W038-B11 Lab documentation and downstream verification recipe
description: Document when and how to use --scene, --scenario, oxide-uxlab, and ox-vt in later UX worksets.

title: W038-B12 Fire Horse high-end viewport doctrine
description: Define first-class and studio Fire Horse review targets that prioritize desktop-quality TUI experience over minimum terminal compromise. Must use W039 mockups/goldens and depend on ox-vt replay for real terminal review.
close_reason: Completed W038-B12 doctrine. W038 now documents Phase 3a high-end Fire Horse terminal review, names First-class and Studio as desktop-quality targets, keeps Compact/fallback as degradation requirements rather than the product ceiling, ties review to W039 mockups/captures, and names ox-vt replay as prerequisite.

title: W038-B14 Fire Horse high-end density and layout refinement
description: Tune the Fire Horse UX-lab renderer for first-class and studio targets so density, hierarchy, rails, docks, and activity surfaces recover the emotion of the colorful mockups before downstream product implementation.
close_reason: High-end Fire Horse UX-lab layout branches added for first-class/studio viewports; refined captures generated for Editing Lens, Command Lens, Run Lane, and Debug Cockpit; review pack records recovered losses against B13 notes. Verified cargo test uxlab, cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab, and isolated WTD run-lane golden after one transient WTD host timeout; product renderer paths unchanged.

title: W038-B13 Fire Horse first-class/studio review pack
description: Produce review artifacts for Editing Lens, Command Lens, Run Lane, and Debug Cockpit at first-class and studio desktop targets: original PNG, replayed/rendered terminal view, text golden, and notes on kept/lost/needs-redesign qualities.
close_reason: Completed W038-B13 baseline review pack. Added first-class/studio viewport support, generated eight baseline captures for Editing Lens, Command Lens, Run Lane, and Debug Cockpit, and documented kept/lost/needs-redesign findings against the colourful Fire Horse mockups. The pack shows B14 is required before evaluation.

title: W038-B15 Fire Horse real FrankenTui mockup renderer
description: Corrective UX proof bead: add a real FrankenTui-based Fire Horse mockup render path covering every Fire Horse scenario at review viewports, preserving the older text-contract renderer while producing comprehensive terminal mockup artifacts suitable for independent UX review.
notes: Implemented separate --mockup and --mockup --ansi Fire Horse renderer path using FrankenTui Frame/Flex/Paragraph/Block/Presenter. Generated current review pack at docs/firehorse_mockups/frankentui_terminal_review with first-class/studio text and ANSI captures for all eight Fire Horse scenarios plus compact default Focus capture. Verification so far: cargo test uxlab; cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab. Bead remains open until commit/cleanup closure.
close_reason: Completed W038-B15: release oxide-uxlab renders Fire Horse scenarios through --mockup and --mockup --ansi, the text contract renderer remains intact, current first-class/studio review artifacts are under docs/firehorse_mockups/frankentui_terminal_review, and cargo test uxlab plus cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab are green.

title: W038-B01 Lab scenario registry and viewport contract
description: Add a lab-only scenario registry, provider contract, smoke scenario, and fixed viewport classes for WTD/lab use.
close_reason: Implemented lab scenario registry, smoke provider, fixed viewport contract, duplicate-id validation, and green unit evidence via cargo test.

title: W038-B02 Non-interactive oxide-uxlab once runner
description: Build the minimal oxide-uxlab --once path that renders one registered scenario at a named viewport for WTD capture.
close_reason: Implemented oxide-uxlab --once, verified standard and compact release smoke renders, helpful unknown-scenario alternatives, and green WTD smoke journey against target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe.

title: W038-B03 WTD capture contract for lab scenarios
description: Add the shared WTD helper and smoke capture convention used by W039 Fire Horse journeys.
close_reason: Added LabScenarioJourney WTD helper, documented the UX-lab capture convention, committed W038 smoke text/VT goldens, and verified helper plus WTD smoke journey against the release oxide-uxlab binary.

title: W038-B04 ox-ide scene scenario loader
description: Add ox-ide --scene for named shell states after W039 proves the Fire Horse direction.

title: W038-B05 ox-ide Msg-script scenario replayer
description: Add ox-ide --scenario YAML replay through ShellModel::update for generic shell verification.

title: W038-B06 ox-vt replay
description: Add ox-vt replay so committed VT captures can be rendered back into a local terminal.
close_reason: Completed W038-B06 ox-vt replay. Added src/bin/ox-vt.rs and library-backed replay support, validated missing/directory errors and byte-exact streaming with cargo test vt::, built target/release/ox-vt.exe, and replayed W037 empty plus W039 Fire Horse Editing Lens VT captures successfully.

title: W038-B07 ox-vt diff
description: Add text-first and optional strict diffing for VT captures.

title: W038-B08 ox-vt bless
description: Add explicit source-to-golden blessing for VT captures without deleting files.

title: W010 shell mockup scaffold epic
close_reason: Completed: W010 delivered a believable FrankenTui shell mockup with state-specific composition, styling, and width-policy behavior sufficient to begin runtime shell work.

title: Create FrankenTui shell scaffold and split the current app into shell modules
description: Establish the new shell mockup entry point from DESIGN_TUI.md, break the single-file prototype into explicit shell modules, and create a fake-data state model suitable for the mockup states.
close_reason: Completed: shell scaffold, modular split, and fake-data state model landed with passing cargo test.

title: Render the canonical shell frame and five static mockup states
description: Render the top bar, explorer, editor area, inspector, lower utility surface, and command palette overlay for the five spec states using fake data.
close_reason: Completed: canonical shell frame and five static mockup states render through the new shell scaffold.

title: Implement region modes, theme tokens, and palette overlay plumbing
description: Add explicit inspector and lower-surface modes, define the initial token/theme system from DESIGN_TUI.md, and wire the command palette overlay through the shell model.
close_reason: Completed: explicit region modes, initial theme token system, and palette overlay plumbing are present in the mockup shell.

title: Implement width adaptation and visible focus styling for the shell mockup
description: Make the shell adapt across the design target widths and ensure region focus and active-state emphasis are obvious in terminal form.
close_reason: Completed: shell mockup adapts for narrow layouts and exposes active region focus in rendered titles.

title: Verify the FrankenTui shell mockup against DESIGN_TUI and the web mockup
description: Compare the terminal mockup against DESIGN_TUI.md and the web-presented mockup, tighten any mismatches, and leave the shell ready for runtime-foundation work.
notes:
Comparison summary:
- Shell frame and state set are proven enough to compare meaningfully against DESIGN_TUI and the web mockup.
- Current shell still reads as a structural scaffold rather than the intended flagship IDE shell.
- Main gaps: top bar is over-dense, empty-state composition does not yet minimize/replace the explorer or hide the lower surface, wide/standard layout policy is not yet differentiated, visual tokens are defined but not rendered as active/inactive styling, and state-specific compositions remain mostly text swaps inside one static frame.
- Follow-up W010 refinement beads have been added before W020 rollout.
close_reason: Completed: comparison against DESIGN_TUI and the web mockup is captured, and the resulting refinement steps are now explicit beads in W010.

title: Tighten shell composition and state-specific layout behavior
description: Bring the shell closer to DESIGN_TUI by refining top-bar density, empty-state composition, lower-surface presence, and distinct state-specific shell arrangements instead of only swapping panel text.
close_reason: Completed: top bar density reduced, empty state no longer renders the lower surface, lower-surface heights are state-shaped, and shell composition now varies by state instead of only panel text.

title: Apply real visual hierarchy and active-region styling to the mockup shell
description: Use the defined TUI token baseline to give the shell stronger active/inactive distinction, calmer panel stratification, and clearer focus ownership than title markers alone.
close_reason: Completed: real panel hierarchy, active/inactive styling, and tone-based border/background treatment are now rendered through the shell view layer.

title: Differentiate wide, standard, and narrow shell policies and validate against the web mockup
description: Make the wide, standard, and narrow layouts meaningfully distinct, then re-compare the shell against DESIGN_TUI and the web mockup to decide whether W010 can close.
close_reason: Completed: wide, standard, and narrow shell policies now differ in layout proportions and overlay sizing, and the shell remains aligned enough with DESIGN_TUI to proceed into runtime work.

title: W041 Fire Horse UX Audit Lab epic
description: Build a terminal-native UX Audit Lab inside oxide-uxlab so Fire Horse mockups can be reviewed against personas, scenarios, state/action mappings, and OxVba seams.

title: W041-B00 Audit lab doctrine and bead graph
description: Create the W041 workset spec, register entry, and live bead graph for the Fire Horse UX Audit Lab.
notes: W041 workset/register/bead graph are present and were extended for agentic automation; implementation has begun. Not closed in this pass because the current change set is not committed as a doctrine closure.

title: W041-B09 Review pack export
description: Write local Markdown and JSON audit review packs with findings, artifact refs, reproduction commands, and captures.
notes: Review pack export is implemented for single-scenario and suite exports. Evidence: target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe --audit --suite firehorse --scenario firehorse-editing-lens-standard --viewport studio --export target/ux_audit_lab/export_single_20260429121255 --json wrote 10 files with concern gate; suite export to target/ux_audit_lab/export_suite_20260429121316 wrote 83 files. Interactive e-key export now uses non-colliding paths. Formal closure still needs explicit e-key WTD/manual pass if required.

title: W041-B11 Downstream audit handoff and gate rules
description: Define gate states and how downstream worksets cite UX Audit Lab evidence, including agent scorecards and design work packets.
notes: Downstream handoff docs updated with batch automation command and unique batch_runs evidence root. docs/TESTING_WTD.md now documents W041 Audit Lab WTD workspaces and journey command. Read-through closure checklist still pending.

title: W041-B12 UX Audit Lab closure review
description: Run the complete Fire Horse audit pass, export evidence, run the agent automation pass, and file follow-up beads for unresolved risks before closing W041.

comments.author: GovertvanDrimmelen
comments.text: Release evidence for Fire Horse design skeleton pass: target/release/ox-ide.exe --firehorse-skeleton rendered the Run Lane screen in a PTY and quit cleanly via q; target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe --audit --batch docs/firehorse_mockups/ux_audit_lab/agent_run.json --json produced 14 scorecards for the seven designed screens across Studio and First-class, 31 files under target/ux_audit_lab/agent_run/batch_runs/firehorse_1777619911_123114100_42704, concern gate only from manual emotional-fit checks; docs export full_suite_frankentui_local_20260501_091256 contains per-screen captures, ANSI streams, scorecards, and briefs.

title: W041-B10 Agent automation runner and scorecard API
description: Add non-interactive audit evaluation and batch commands that emit machine-readable functional and aesthetic scorecards for agentic UX design work.
notes: Agent automation runner now produces parseable scorecards and writes batch evidence under the requested output root. Evidence: target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe --audit --batch docs/firehorse_mockups/ux_audit_lab/agent_run.json --json produced 4 scorecards, 11 files under target/ux_audit_lab/agent_run/batch_runs/firehorse_1777457575_550826500_58024, concern gate, exit 1; evaluate functional,aesthetic produced parseable scorecard with exit 1. Formal closure still needs five-minute agent pass over the full command set.

title: W041-B01 Audit authority inventory and traceability map
description: Create traceability from personas, scenarios, Fire Horse artifacts, terminal captures, projection contracts, and downstream worksets.
notes: TRACEABILITY.md is present and now reflects the implemented non-interactive JSON/audit scorecard surfaces. Known gaps have been narrowed to the interactive cockpit, review-pack export, and manual emotional-fit evidence. Not closed yet because the current change set is uncommitted.

title: W041-B02 Audit data model and Fire Horse suite fixtures
description: Add uxlab audit-only model, registry, and Fire Horse audit fixtures linking personas, scenarios, criteria, and mappings.
notes: W041 audit model/registry/schema/fixtures are implemented under src/shell/uxlab/audit, including Fire Horse personas, scenario mapping, functional/aesthetic criteria, design briefs, matrix rows, and unit coverage. cargo test uxlab passes. Not closed yet because the change set is still uncommitted and downstream WTD/release evidence has not been attached to bead closure.

title: W041-B03 Audit CLI listing and single-scenario export
description: Expose audit suite listing and non-interactive audit dossier/export through oxide-uxlab audit flags.
notes: Audit CLI discovery surfaces are implemented for --audit --list --json, --matrix --json, --brief --json, and --once --json. Release oxide-uxlab smoke commands parsed JSON successfully for suite list, design brief, dossier, and matrix after cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab. B03 is not closed because --export and WTD journey coverage remain future work.

title: W041-B04 Interactive audit lab shell
description: Open an interactive FrankenTui audit cockpit with Scenario Atlas, Live Stage, Audit Dossier, and Evidence Rail.
notes: Implemented interactive Audit Lab cockpit in oxide-uxlab --audit with Scenario Atlas, Live Fire Horse Stage, Audit Dossier, and Evidence Rail. Evidence: cargo test uxlab passed 55 tests; cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab passed; cargo test --features wtd --test wtd_smoke audit_lab -- --test-threads=1 passed 2 W041 journeys against target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe after refreshing stale WTD host. Studio WTD journey verifies regions and scenario selection update to Command Lens. Formal bead closure still needs five-minute user pass and commit-message cross-check.

title: W041-B05 Persona and journey review lenses
description: Add Persona and Journey dossier modes for inspecting target users, task steps, expected surfaces, and expected actions.
notes: Persona and Journey dossier lenses are implemented in the interactive cockpit. Evidence: cargo test uxlab passed 55 tests; WTD audit_lab first-class journey verified initial Persona cockpit and switched to Journey with actions visible against target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe. Formal closure still needs five-minute persona/journey pass across the planned scenario set.

title: W041-B06 State action and OxVba mapping lens
description: Add Mapping dossier mode for visible surface to projection, owner, action id, OxVba seam, downstream workset, and evidence refs.
notes: Mapping dossier lens is implemented with visible surface, projection, action/seam, owner workset, and seam status rows. Evidence: cargo test uxlab passed 55 tests; WTD audit_lab first-class journey switched to Mapping and verified HostWorkspaceSession::diagnostics was visible against target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe. Formal closure still needs five-minute mapping pass across Editing Lens, Command Lens, Run Lane, Debug Cockpit, and Console Fit.

title: W041-B07 Audit checklist and local finding capture
description: Add Checklist and Findings modes with local pass, concern, fail, and deferred marks for audit criteria.
notes: Checklist and Findings modes are implemented with local pass/concern/fail/deferred markings. Evidence: cargo test uxlab passed 55 tests; WTD audit_lab first-class journey marked functional.persona_fit as concern and verified the finding in Findings mode against target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe. Formal closure still needs full five-minute local finding pass and any follow-up beads for surprising results.

title: W041-B08 Viewport ladder and render-mode comparison
description: Cycle Studio, First-class, Standard, and Compact viewports and compare mockup render with contract render while preserving audit state.
notes: Viewport ladder and render-mode comparison are implemented. Evidence: cargo test uxlab passed 55 tests; WTD audit_lab first-class journey cycled from first-class to standard and toggled mockup to contract render, verifying labels against target/release/oxide-uxlab.exe. Formal closure still needs Studio/First-class visual pass and Compact degradation pass.

title: W039 Fire Horse terminal UX proof epic
description: Turn the Fire Horse UX direction into terminal-cell UX-lab proofs, projection contracts, seam-shaped fixtures, and WTD goldens without changing shipping behavior.
close_reason: Completed W039 epic: B00-B08 are closed. Fire Horse terminal UX proof now has reset doctrine, projection contract, fixture suite, seven fixture scenarios, real-editing adapter, WTD goldens, and downstream handoff notes; shipping behavior remains unchanged.

description: Write UX_RESET.md so previous OxIde front-end/rendering/UI work is superseded, non-authoritative, and not maintained in parallel; classify reusable inner framework without deleting files.
close_reason: Completed UX_RESET doctrine, linked it from hardening review and W039, and read through reset criteria; no code or deletion performed.

description: Write UX_PROJECTION_CONTRACT.md covering FireHorseProjection, surface ownership, state mapping, OxVba seam mapping, and action ids.
close_reason: Completed projection contract doctrine, linked it from the hardening review and W039, and mapped visible Fire Horse commands to action ids.

description: Render Run Lane and Debug Cockpit via W038 lab scenarios from seam-shaped run/debug fixture projections with WTD coverage.
close_reason: Run Lane and Debug Cockpit Fire Horse lab scenarios render from seam-shaped run/debug fixture projections. Evidence: cargo fmt; cargo test run_lane; cargo test debug_cockpit; cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab; direct release one-shot renders for firehorse-run-lane-standard and firehorse-debug-cockpit-standard; UPDATE_GOLDENS WTD refresh for both views; cargo test --features wtd --test wtd_smoke firehorse_; cargo test uxlab.

description: Render Launchpad, Console Fit, and Compact Focus as W038 lab scenarios using fixture data only and declared viewport classes.
close_reason: Launchpad, Console Fit, and Compact Focus render as Fire Horse UX-lab scenarios from fixture-only data at their declared W038 viewports. Evidence: cargo fmt; cargo test uxlab; cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab; direct release one-shot renders for firehorse-launchpad-standard, firehorse-console-fit-light, and firehorse-focus-compact; UPDATE_GOLDENS WTD refresh for all three; cargo test --features wtd --test wtd_smoke firehorse_ (7 passed). Also restored the firehorse-run WTD profile block caught by the full assertion slice.

Evidence: cargo fmt; cargo test uxlab; cargo build --release --bin oxide-uxlab; direct release one-shot render for firehorse-real-editing; UPDATE_GOLDENS refresh for editing lens and real-editing adapter; cargo test --features wtd --test wtd_smoke firehorse_ (8 passed).

description: Update Fire Horse docs and downstream worksets with W039 outputs, citations, open seam gaps, and implementation handoff boundaries.
close_reason: Completed W039-B08 doctrine handoff. Updated hardening review with W039 outputs, downstream owners, and open seam gaps; updated Fire Horse design status; added W039 input notes to W040/W060/W070/W080/W090/W100; checked register ordering remains W038 -> W039 -> W040.

title: W040 project and workspace management epic
description: Own the workspace shell over OxVba project truth.
close_reason: All W040 child tasks (rc8.1-rc8.4) are closed; project/workspace management scope is complete.

close_reason: Project actions now route through OxVba project edit helpers and OxVba project-model rewrites; shell keys reload real workspace state and cargo test passes.

close_reason: Implemented session snapshot persistence and restore with unit coverage (session_store + shell model).

title: Add project-management layouts and inspector/action surfaces to the shell

close_reason: Removed silent project-action no-ops by surfacing success/error/dirty-gate feedback popovers, with targeted unit coverage.

description: Make document identity and lifecycle explicit behind the TUI shell.

description: Deliver real document save/reload UX over mounted workspace documents.

description: Support hidden buffers, visible views, and stable document composition.

title: Detect external document changes and persist open-document shell state
description: Handle external changes and restore open-document state honestly.
